use_cases.name: ChainScope Explorer
use_cases.description: Multi-chain block explorer with real-time transaction visualization, whale alert system, and gas fee predictor. Supports Ethereum, Bitcoin, Solana, and Polygon.

use_cases.name: TokenFlow Analytics
use_cases.description: Token flow analysis platform tracking money movement between wallets, exchanges, and DeFi protocols. Identifies wash trading, MEV bots, and smart money patterns.

use_cases.name: DeFiPulse Monitor
use_cases.description: DeFi protocol health monitor with TVL tracking, yield comparison, impermanent loss calculator, and smart contract risk scoring across 50+ protocols.

use_cases.name: WhaleWatch Alerts
use_cases.description: Real-time whale transaction monitoring with customizable alerts. Tracks large transfers, exchange deposits/withdrawals, and dormant wallet activations.

use_cases.name: GasOracle Fee Tracker
use_cases.description: Cross-chain gas fee analytics with predictive modeling. Recommends optimal transaction timing, shows historical fee patterns, and estimates costs for complex DeFi operations.

use_cases.name: NFTGraph Provenance
use_cases.description: NFT ownership and transfer history visualizer. Tracks wash sales, identifies undervalued collections, and maps holder concentration across marketplaces.

use_cases.name: MempoolLens Realtime
use_cases.description: Mempool visualization tool showing pending transactions in real-time. Identifies frontrunning attempts, sandwich attacks, and priority fee bidding wars.

use_cases.name: BridgeTracer Cross-Chain
use_cases.description: Cross-chain bridge transaction tracker. Follows assets as they move between L1s and L2s, detects bridge exploits, and monitors bridge TVL and security health.

use_cases.name: StakeView Validator
use_cases.description: Proof-of-Stake validator analytics. Tracks validator performance, slashing events, delegation flows, and staking yield across Ethereum, Cosmos, and Solana.

use_cases.name: TxPattern Forensics
use_cases.description: Blockchain forensics tool for compliance teams. Address clustering, risk scoring, OFAC/sanctions screening, and transaction graph analysis for AML.

use_cases.name: LiquidMap DEX Tracker
use_cases.description: DEX liquidity and volume tracker across Uniswap, Curve, and 30+ AMMs. Shows pool depth, slippage estimates, and optimal routing for large trades.

use_cases.name: BlockPrint Miner Stats
use_cases.description: Mining and block production analytics. Tracks hashrate distribution, block rewards, MEV extraction, and client diversity for Ethereum and Bitcoin.

use_cases.name: AirdropRadar Scanner
use_cases.description: Airdrop eligibility scanner and tracker. Analyzes wallet activity against known airdrop criteria, estimates potential rewards, and tracks claim deadlines.

use_cases.name: SmartAudit Contract Viewer
use_cases.description: Smart contract source code viewer with automated vulnerability detection, gas optimization suggestions, and interaction simulator.

use_cases.name: YieldHarvest Optimizer
use_cases.description: DeFi yield farming optimizer. Compares APYs across protocols, calculates IL risk, and auto-suggests portfolio rebalancing strategies with gas cost awareness.

use_cases.name: LayerZero Bridge Map
use_cases.description: Visual map of cross-chain message passing and asset bridging. Tracks omnichain fungible tokens (OFTs), message latency, and relayer performance.

use_cases.name: RugCheck Scanner
use_cases.description: Token safety scanner that detects honeypots, hidden mints, ownership concentration, and liquidity locks. Provides risk scores for new token launches.

use_cases.name: SolanaBeach Validator
use_cases.description: Solana-specific block explorer with TPS tracker, vote account analysis, and program interaction explorer. Optimized for Solana's high-throughput architecture.

use_cases.name: DAOScope Governance
use_cases.description: DAO governance analytics platform. Tracks proposal voting, delegate power distribution, treasury flows, and voter participation across Snapshot and on-chain governance.

use_cases.name: L2Beat Rollup Monitor
use_cases.description: Layer 2 rollup comparison dashboard. Tracks TVL, finality times, proof submission frequency, and data availability costs across Optimism, Arbitrum, zkSync, and more.
